text.title: Prototyping Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: clickable prototype plan for an onboarding flow with three scenario-based tasks.

example.title: Objectives
example.p: 1) Can users complete onboarding without help? 2) Which step has highest drop-off? 3) Does payment timing affect completion?

example.title: Fidelity
example.p: Clickable (Figma prototype) — flow is the question, visual nuance is not.

example.title: Scope
example.p: In: welcome, account creation, payment. Out: settings (not on critical path), invitation-flow (separate hypothesis), error-page polish (testing happy-path first).

example.title: Tasks (human-reviewed)
example.p: 1) "You just downloaded the app and want to start using it" — success: reaches Home tab. 2) "You decide to upgrade to paid" — success: confirmation. 3) "You forgot your password mid-flow" — success: reset link reached.

example.title: Decision rule
example.p: Move to dev if ≥4/5 participants complete unassisted AND no severity-1 finding.
